stages.label: Formal Notice Sent
stages.legal_basis: Consumer Protection Act, 2019 - mandatory grievance window before escalation
stages.description: A formal written demand notice has been sent to the landlord requesting return of the security deposit.

stages.label: Consumer Forum Complaint Filed
stages.legal_basis: Consumer Protection Act, 2019, Section 35 - complaint before District Commission
stages.description: A complaint has been filed with the District Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission.

stages.label: District Commission Hearing
stages.legal_basis: Consumer Protection Act, 2019, Section 36 - procedure on admission of complaint
stages.description: The case has been escalated to a formal hearing before the District Commission.
